query:
UPDATE project_job
                SET cost   =       data.cost,
                    status =       data.status,
                    job_id =       data.job_id
                FROM (
                    SELECT
                        UNNEST($2::UUID[]) AS id,
                        UNNEST($3::REAL[]) AS cost,
                        UNNEST($4::PROJECT_JOB_STATUS[]) AS status,
                        UNNEST($5::INTEGER[]) AS job_id
                ) AS data
                WHERE project_id = $1
                AND project_job.id = data.id
